{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322020931ACD1F45C6519B75168B5"}"},"total":1554},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7255714185648554808","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是一章一章追上来的，整体还可以，就是我发现我看的那本书完结的都好草率（大哭）女主睿智聪明，男主，我不想夸男主还有秦云初的老顽童反正好多东西，反正都好有趣啊，非常推荐，拜拜"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689352869,"group_id":"7220962541000723468","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"及时行乐 享乐主义者 为这一秒的开心着想，不为下一秒而担忧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2w4wJ1kws9V16+vVX4zkkY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/485c594850e64e1192033840ab138deb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709333&x-signature=ClsMeX%2Fe5o6B8ffkDRBska19TZk%3D","user_id":"937197485168974","user_name":"秋霜晚声"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"937197485168974","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220962541000723468","book_info":{"abstract":"【马甲多，掉马快，燃炸打脸爽文！双强，美艳酷飒女王VS冷痞京圈大佬！】
  数学天才秦云岫穿书了，穿成了一个命运悲惨的豪门养女。养女丑陋阴郁，是个人人厌恶的草包废物，走到哪里就被嘲讽到哪里！
她走出豪门时，大家都在看她笑话，等着她流落街头捡垃圾吃。
可是后来——
天才小神医是她，
千万粉丝的网红是她，
数学大神是她，
京市顶级豪门秦家唯一的继承人，还是她！
......
数不清的大佬身份，惊呆了众人的下巴！
还有什么，是她不会的？
而那号称一辈子单身的京圈太子爷，圈着她的细腰，轻声诱哄：“岫岫，和我在一起吧，我什么都给你。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/298e9c69225b5065966622f0898a59cc","author":"释个瓜子","author_id":"","book_id":"7220962541000723468","book_name":"震惊，大佬穿书后马甲狂掉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5280人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7222506473576727100","read_count":"5280","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"397609"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"188","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,穿越,女强,天才,穿书,虐渣,强强,大佬,打脸,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/704d42d2069601f98d53c0d896fa48f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300571&x-signature=bx4nWVd15VvpbRPv%2FktB0qG9ctY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3993905062216221","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.2547164e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322020931ACD1F45C6519B75168B5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":28456,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":51003,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":17123},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7590586465137541912","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢这本书的“双重生”设定，两人带着前世记忆重逢，没有单方面的试探与隐瞒，而是从初遇就带着“同类相认”的默契。女主重生归来手撕渣男贱女，不是靠金手指一路开挂，而是用前世积累的智谋步步为营，每一次反击都精准戳中要害，既解气又逻辑在线；男主更是难得的清醒人设，没有恋爱脑拖后腿，而是看穿女主马甲的同时，选择成为她的盟友，两人联手搞事业、虐反派，全程没有谁依附谁的不对等，只有“你懂我的隐忍，我护你的锋芒”的双向奔赴。
马甲掉落的名场面更是点睛之笔，不是刻意炫技的尬掉，而是随着剧情推进自然揭晓，每一个马甲背后都藏着前世的伏笔与今生的底气。配角也没有沦为工具人，反派的算计有逻辑，助攻的戏份不突兀，全员智商在线的群像戏让剧情张力拉满。
比起单纯的打脸爽文，这本文更难得的是在爽感之外，写出了双重生的宿命感与救赎感。男女主带着前世的遗憾与伤痛重逢，没有沉溺于过去，而是借着重生的机会互相治愈、共同成长，让感情线既有甜宠的苏点，又有并肩作战的厚重感。
真的非常值得看👀","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":8,"text":"双重生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774116571B75168B5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227590586465137541912%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227220962541000723468%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767324697,"group_id":"7220962541000723468","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NybyeexVYNN7+FvIhzMgXg4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8dab925f7d4d4ff497ea2ada91747f69~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705652&x-signature=i30e%2FXVdpFXTyLFXAzZtSZtGTxU%3D","user_id":"396259731444632","user_name":"祈愿（柒）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"396259731444632","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646569185,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220962541000723468","book_info":{"abstract":"【马甲多，掉马快，燃炸打脸爽文！双强，美艳酷飒女王VS冷痞京圈大佬！】

（尖叫）（扭曲）🌚嘻嘻，超级推荐哦！希望作者可以多写一点这种类型的~[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690890740,"group_id":"7220962541000723468","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不畏浮云遮望眼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3kdhS2UlmgdZNBBQjsXf8E=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d53e007cb9df455ea080571cad0bb563~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707476&x-signature=m3DissB5AigiI9DDhFCF2CHOei0%3D","user_id":"47968567694236","user_name":"你的snow酱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"47968567694236","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220962541000723468","book_info":{"abstract":"【马甲多，掉马快，燃炸打脸爽文！双强，美艳酷飒女王VS冷痞京圈大佬！】
